currentState.summary: Replace with verified current behavior and known drift.
sources: Replace with a code, runtime, test, active spec, or operating-rule reference.

scope: Replace with one observable in-scope outcome.
observableCriteria: Replace with one criterion that can pass or fail.
risks: Replace with one risk and keep its mitigation in the enriched issue.

costLicenseReview.justification: Complete the review or document why it is objectively not applicable before propose.

manual: Replace with the expected manual evidence.

rollback.strategy: Replace with a bounded reversal strategy.
rollback.trigger: Replace with the observable rollback trigger.
